message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013, Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11950","justification":"Includes detailed measures of political behaviour and attitudes (vote intention, party evaluations, issue positions, political interest) in Germany around the 2013 federal election, within the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2017, Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13052","justification":"Captures political behaviour and attitudes of voters in Germany during the 2017 Bundestag election campaign, clearly within the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2009–2013–2017, Trend Study","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13325","justification":"Trend component focusing on political attitudes, party preferences, turnout and vote choice across elections, covering the early and mid-2010s in Germany."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in United Germany 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Survey on political participation, trust, satisfaction with democracy and electoral behaviour in Germany conducted in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11400","justification":"Nationally representative survey including modules on political interest, party identification, democratic values and institutional trust in Germany in 2010."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2012","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11500","justification":"Provides data on political attitudes and behaviour (e.g. trust, party ID, left–right self‑placement) in Germany in the early 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11600","justification":"Includes repeated political attitude items and political engagement measures for Germany in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11700","justification":"Covers political attitudes, values, and participation indicators in Germany, capturing developments in the later 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13278","justification":"Focuses, among other topics, on political opinions and behaviour in Germany at the end of the 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) Round 7 – Germany (2014)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12301","justification":"German sample from a cross‑national survey with rich measures of political trust, efficacy, participation, and ideological orientations in the mid‑2010s."}]}
